subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Most Great Name, through which whoso hath borne it hath never been drowned in the seas and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الاعظم الذی من حمله ما غرق فی البحار و ما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @Greatest Name, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
